title: Food prices could rise as Iran conflict disrupts fertilizer supply chain
summary_full: The Iran conflict is disrupting fertilizer shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, raising supply concerns and potentially increasing global food inflation.
summary_public: The Iran conflict is disrupting fertilizer shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, raising supply concerns and potentially increasing global food inflation.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran conflict disrupts fertilizer supply chain
